title: Athlete's Foot Be Gone: 11 Herbal Creams for Runners
description: Melaleuca alternifolia creams are a popular treatment for athlete's foot due to the presence of tea tree oil, a key constituent of the plant. Tea tree oil is rich in compounds such as cineole, terpinen-4-ol, and limonene, which have antifungal properties. These properties help to combat the fungus that causes athlete's foot, such as Trichophyton rubrum and Epidermophyton floccosum.
